[INFORMASI KONTEKS VISUAL GAMBAR]:
- Deskripsi Visual: This image shows a game UI screen with a highlighted character-selection layout and a large stylized figure made of overlapping red energy lines on a dark background.

Main Subject:
The main focus is a large, full-body, human-like character silhouette standing in the center-right, with red, ribbon-like energy effects swirling around them and forming a glowing infinity-like shape. The character wears a dark top and light blue plaid pants, with a small face cover or mask area and a head covering that includes a red circular element. Small white pose icons of other figures are scattered across the middle and right side.

Setting:
The scene is indoors or otherwise not shown as a real-world environment; it is a stylized digital interface on a black, dark-gray background with glowing UI elements. The lighting is purely graphical: bright red and yellow highlights, white icons, and subtle ambient glow suggest a game menu screen.

Visual Details:
On the left, there is a vertical menu with headings in uppercase letters: “FASHION,” “SKILL SKIN,” “POSTUR,” “COLLECTION,” “KENDARAAN,” “PROFILE,” and “LAINNYA.” Near the upper-left, a horizontal banner reads “EMOTE” with a yellow “NEW” label. Several square tiles in a grid show white silhouette figures on dark backgrounds; some tiles have red glow effects and a yellow border around the selected item. At the top-left area of the screen, there are additional interface elements including currency-like numbers and small icons. In the center, a dark grid of small white pose icons includes some figures with lock-like circles nearby. At the bottom-right, a white rectangular button reads “UNEQUIP,” and near it is a small number “591Rb” in yellow/white. The overall composition combines a left-side selection panel with a large central-right character preview, viewed from a front-facing, slightly angled presentation typical of a game menu, with the red energy effect dominating the right half.

Practical Summary:
The image is a video game fashion or emote selection screen with a selected tile in a grid on the left. On the right, a stylized character stands amid swirling red energy effects, with pose icons and an “UNEQUIP” button visible.

Pertanyaan asli user: Analyze this image for NSFW (Not Safe For Work) / pornographic content / nudity. Reply strictly in JSON format with three fields: 'nsfw' (boolean: true if it contains nudity, porn, suggestive, or nsfw content, false if it is safe/sfw), 'confidence' (number: from 0 to 100 representing the likelihood of nsfw/nudity/suggestive content), and 'label' (string: 'porn', 'nsfw', 'suggestive', or 'safe' depending on the content). Do not include markdown formatting or backticks, just raw JSON.
